title: Against Wind and Tide: A Cuban Odyssey
original_title: Against Wind and Tide: A Cuban Odyssey
overview: Follows the Mariel boatlift, a mass emigration of Cubans who traveled from Cuba's Mariel Harbor to the United States between April 15 and October 31, 1980.
